shortDescription.default: L48 FY27 Operations performance dashboard reading the metrics workbook from a SharePoint library.

longDescription.default: Operations dashboard: revenue vs budget, TRIR/COPQ/CSTAT/cost/profit by branch and month, quarterly rollups, and shared per-branch notes. Reads the FY27 metrics .xlsx live from a document library; update by replacing the file.

features.title: spfx-ops-dashboard Feature
features.description: The feature that activates elements of the spfx-ops-dashboard solution.
